title: Sing Me a Song of Texas
actors: Rosemary Lane, Tom Tyler, Guinn 'Big Boy' Williams
plot: Wealthy rancher Charley Bronson (Noah Beery) invites both of his nieces, Laurie Lang (Rosemary Lane) and Hilda Cartwright (Carole Mathews), neither of which knows him by sight, to his Texas ranch in order to watch them and decide ...
